vocabulary.example: The test log records the condition associated with clearance distance.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 測試日誌記錄了與空間距離相關的條件。

vocabulary.example: We confirmed overvoltage category before releasing the measurement result.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 我們在發布量測結果前確認了過電壓類別。

vocabulary.example: The laboratory evaluates transient overvoltage under documented environmental conditions.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 實驗室在有紀錄的環境條件下評估暫態過電壓。

vocabulary.example: The report links peak working voltage to the applicable requirement and result.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 報告將峰值工作電壓連結到適用要求與結果。

vocabulary.example: The engineer compared altitude correction with the approved baseline.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 工程師將海拔修正與核准基準進行比較。

vocabulary.example: The final review found that homogeneous field was consistently documented.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 最終審查確認均勻電場已有一致的文件紀錄。

vocabulary.example: The technical record includes objective evidence for inhomogeneous field.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 技術紀錄包含非均勻電場的客觀證據。

vocabulary.example: The customer requested a clear explanation of air gap.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 客戶要求清楚說明空氣間隙。

vocabulary.example: The procedure defines the acceptance criterion for basic insulation.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 程序定義了基本絕緣的接受準則。

vocabulary.example: The test plan identifies how supplementary insulation will be controlled and recorded.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 測試計畫說明如何控制並記錄附加絕緣。

common_sentences.english: I will explain how transient overvoltage affects compliance.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我會說明暫態過電壓如何影響符合性。

common_sentences.english: Our review found no abnormality in peak working voltage.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我們的審查未發現峰值工作電壓有異常。

common_sentences.english: Can you confirm the acceptance criterion for altitude correction?
common_sentences.zh_tw: 你可以確認海拔修正的接受準則嗎？

common_sentences.english: We isolated homogeneous field as the dominant factor.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我們已確認均勻電場是主要影響因素。

common_sentences.english: The customer requested a concise update on inhomogeneous field.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 客戶要求提供非均勻電場的精簡進度說明。

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: I have verified clearance distance and recorded the setup.
lines.zh_tw: 我已確認空間距離並記錄測試設定。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Good. What evidence supports the decision for overvoltage category?
lines.zh_tw: 很好。有哪些證據支持對過電壓類別的判定？

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: The calibrated result, uncertainty record, and setup photographs are linked in the test log.
lines.zh_tw: 校正後的結果、不確定度紀錄與測試設定照片都已連結於測試日誌。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Please confirm the acceptance criterion before releasing the report.
lines.zh_tw: 發布報告前，請確認接受準則。

debug_case.title: Antenna gain mismatch — Clearance investigation
debug_case.title_zh_tw: 天線增益不一致：空間距離調查
debug_case.problem: A pre-compliance check on Day 022 shows a repeatable antenna gain mismatch condition.
debug_case.background: The Clearance configuration was documented before the result was compared with the applicable criterion. This is a realistic training scenario; learners must distinguish observations from hypotheses.
possible_causes: The production antenna differs from the approved sample.
Cable loss was omitted from the gain calculation.
check_steps: Confirm antenna part number and revision.
Recalculate gain using calibrated path loss.
corrective_actions: Update the technical file when an authorized change applies.
debug_case.supervisor_question: How would you prove the root cause before changing the Clearance design?
debug_case.suggested_answer: I would first verify the setup and reproduce the result. Then I would isolate one variable at a time, record objective evidence, and repeat the measurement after the corrective action.

interview_question.question: Describe your RF test experience. Connect your answer to Clearance.
interview_question.hint_zh_tw: 請說明儀器、標準、測試流程與一項可量化成果。 並連結到「空間距離」。
interview_question.sample_answer: I plan test configurations, verify instruments, capture traceable results, and investigate abnormal RF behavior. I also explain the technical impact to project teams. In Clearance, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
interview_question.natural_rewrite: A natural engineering answer uses a clear context, your specific action, objective evidence, and the resulting technical or business impact.

quiz.prompt: 「clearance distance」的正確繁體中文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: clearance distance 指的是「空間距離」。

quiz.prompt: 「過電壓類別」的正確工程英文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: 工程文件中可使用 overvoltage category。

quiz.prompt: The laboratory evaluates ________ under documented environmental conditions.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 實驗室在有紀錄的環境條件下評估暫態過電壓。
quiz.explanation: 完整句子的關鍵詞是 transient overvoltage。

quiz.prompt: 播放語音後，選出你聽到的專業詞彙。
quiz.explanation: 播放內容是 peak working voltage（峰值工作電壓）。

quiz.prompt: Describe your RF test experience. Connect your answer to Clearance.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 請說明儀器、標準、測試流程與一項可量化成果。 並連結到「空間距離」。
quiz.answer: I plan test configurations, verify instruments, capture traceable results, and investigate abnormal RF behavior. I also explain the technical impact to project teams. In Clearance, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
quiz.explanation: 回答應包含具體行動、工程證據與結果；系統採關鍵概念給分。
